name: the-book-whisperer
description: Donalyn Miller's classic guide for educators — transforming reluctant readers into lifelong readers through freedom, choice, time, and the power of a reading role model.
useCase: Diagnosing reader types, designing choice-based reading programs, building classroom libraries, replacing ineffective practices, becoming a reading role model.
knownRisks: Miller's approach requires significant buy-in from administrators and parents
The 40-book requirement may need adjustment for different age groups
Building a classroom library of several thousand books requires personal financial investment
